subcodes.first_line: The Book which the Sovereign of the Kingdom hath revealed unto him who hath believed in God, the Peerless, the All-Informed. Thy name hath, verily, been mentioned before the Wronged One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مالک الملکوت لمن آمن بالله الفرد الخبیر قد حضر اسمک لدی المظلوم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
